categories.name: Bundled multi-PDMR
categories.description: Filing names multiple directors in one announcement -- D-STRICT refuses to split

categories.name: Could not classify / extract
categories.description: Parser could not extract ticker / company / type / required fields -- case-by-case review

categories.name: Multi-tranche / multi-transaction
categories.description: Filing reports two or more distinct prices or transactions for the same PDMR -- needs row fan-out

categories.name: Foreign currency
categories.description: Non-GBP filing -- needs FX rate fetcher

categories.name: Corporate actions
categories.description: Vesting / option exercise / SIPP / DRIP / scheme-of-reconstruction -- case-by-case review

categories.name: Zero-share / data quirks
categories.description: Zero-share non-grant rows, nil consideration, no numeric values -- case-by-case review
